steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence states that humans inherit physical traits from their parents. The second sentence makes the same claim about dogs. These are two parallel, independent examples — the blank must signal that relationship.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Similarly,": means 'in the same way.' Dogs inheriting traits mirrors humans inheriting traits — a direct parallel. ✓
  • "In other words,": signals a restatement of one idea. Dogs are a separate, new example, not a restatement about humans. ✗
  • "As a result,": signals causation — humans inheriting traits does not cause dogs to inherit traits. ✗
  • "In conclusion,": signals a final summary. This is a second illustrative example, not a conclusion. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
